ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Car number of the driver */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the driver belongs to */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the driver started their professional career */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of career wins */,
  "career_poles" INTEGER /* Total number of career poles */,
  "career_top_5s" INTEGER /* Total number of career top 5 finishes */,
  "career_top_10s" INTEGER /* Total number of career top 10 finishes */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the driver is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the driver */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of starts by the driver */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the driver */,
  "diff" INTEGER /* Difference in points from the leader */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the driver */,
  "stage_wins" INTEGER /* Number of stage wins by the driver */,
  "playoff_points" INTEGER /* Number of playoff points earned by the driver */,
  "poles" INTEGER /* Number of poles by the driver in the current season */,
  "top_5s" INTEGER /* Number of top 5 finishes by the driver in the current season */,
  "top_10s" INTEGER /* Number of top 10 finishes by the driver in the current season */,
  "laps_led" INTEGER /* Total number of laps led by the driver in the current season */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of laps completed by the driver in the current season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in miles */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Total number of laps in the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in miles */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., Cup Series, Xfinity Series) */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the driver in the race */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver in the race */,
  "qualifying_position" INTEGER /* Qualifying position of the driver */,
  "laps_led" INTEGER /* Number of laps led by the driver in the race */,
  "laps_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of laps completed by the driver in the race */,
  "fastest_lap" TEXT /* Fastest lap time by the driver in the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the driver in the race (e.g., Finished, DNF, DNS) */,
  "stage_1_position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver at the end of Stage 1 */,
  "stage_2_position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver at the end of Stage 2 */,
  "stage_3_position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver at the end of Stage 3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "series" TEXT /* Name of the series (e.g., NASCAR Cup Series, Xfinity Series) */,
  "number_of_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races in the season */,
  "champion_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion driver for the season */,
  "champion_team" TEXT /* Name of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in miles */,
  "number_of_turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the track */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., Oval, Road Course) */,
  "track_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the track (e.g., Short Track, Intermediate, Superspeedway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)
